latestIgtvVideos.caption:
My first TV appearance 🥰🥰 on Ashleigh Banfield’s (formerly CNN and ABC) show on NewsNation. This is a shortened version that includes context on the story and the parts of me talking! It covered my perspective on Gen Z’s priorities during the job search and attitudes towards professional ghosting in today’s social media-driven culture. The full segment is linked in my bio!!

Would love to hear your thoughts in the comments 🤗 This was a super fun experience and I would love to do more things like this in the future!!!

#genz #jobsearch #jobhunt #jobs #jobinterview #career #careerdevelopment #internship #interview #womeninbusiness #womenintech

latestPosts.caption:
HAPPY RELEASE DAY 🥹🎉

I wrote this book because I remember what it felt like when I was just starting my personal finance journey: lost and overwhelmed, and like financial success was something other people had figured out, not me 

This is the book I wish I had at the start: a relatable, Gen Z-centric resource rooted in empowerment and real-world experience. Like a conversation with a friend who’s walked in your shoes and genuinely wants to see you win

A huge thank you to the teams at @sourcebooks and @callistopublishing for your unwavering support and belief in me as a first-time author. And to this community: thank you for cheering me on, learning with me, and believing in this mission. I truly wouldn’t be here without you 🤍

After 1.5 years of late nights and weekend writing sessions… it’s officially out in the world. I hope it reaches the people who are ready to take control of their finances and build the future they want.

Now available everywhere books are sold — paperback, ebook, and audiobook. Link in bio ✨

I can’t wait to see where this book goes from here 🥹

these are the finance essentials 🤝 like & follow @bylillianzhang for more tips :)

Top attractions in Banff, Canada and the total cost of the trip during peak summer season (4 nights, family of 3) 🌲🏔️ It’s one of the most breathtaking places, would highly recommend a visit :)

As someone who didn’t go on vacations that often growing up, it brings me a lot of joy to be able to treat my parents now 🥰🥹

@hotelcanoeandsuites @banffgondola @suddensally 

#travel #personalfinance #banff #canada #money

Went outside to touch water and grass 🌊🌱

Spent a wonderful 3 days in Banff (Alberta, Canada)! Fav things:
• Lake Louise (a MUST visit): the most beautiful and fresh lake. You can go hiking along the trail and go kayaking!
• Riding the @banffgondola up Sulphur Mountain and enjoying a meal at the peak
• Hiking Johnston Canyon and seeing waterfalls 
• Staying at @hotelcanoeandsuites
• Making new animal friends 🫎

#travel #banff #canada

Lake Louise literally has the most beautiful water 🥹

Can’t beat an outdoor heated pool overlooking the mountains 🏔️

Comment “YES” to see my portfolio holdings & a list of money tools to organize and grow your portfolio 

Please ensure to do your own research! This is for informative purposes only, as everyone’s risk profiles are different 🤍

Context: I’ve been consistently investing my earnings since I was 20, and now I’m 26. I started off putting in small amounts and increased my contributions as my earnings increased. A majority of the $ came from my job and my business, but capital gains account for around 20-30% of my overall portfolio depending on the market ^^ My investing approach is passive and holding on for the long term!

Follow for more content about business & investing 💚

#investing #stockmarket #finance #wealthbuilder #investmentportfolio
